- /Users/apple/hivemind-plugin-private/.planning/phases/24.1-agent-hierarchy-restructure/24-CONTEXT.md

## CRITICAL CONSTRAINTS
1. Do NOT modify frontmatter — only add/update BODY content after the `---` delimiter
2. Do NOT add tools/permission/temperature/steps/color fields
3. Do NOT add looping/gating/hierarchy logic
4. Each agent body must include:
   - ## Role
   - ## Artifact Contract
   - ## Execution Flow (with Deviation Rules + Analysis Paralysis Guard)
   - ## Success Criteria
   - ## Delegation Boundary

## Agent Body Template
```markdown
## Role
[What this agent does, why it has this expertise]

## Artifact Contract
- **Produces:** {file path and naming convention}
- **Format:** {YAML frontmatter fields, required sections}
- **Location:** {.planning/ or .hivemind/ or project root}

## Execution Flow
1. Read required context files
2. Execute task with deviation rules
3. Create artifact with correct naming
4. Self-check (verify claims before reporting)
5. Return structured completion

### Deviation Rules
- Auto-fix bugs/inconsistencies found during execution
- Auto-add missing critical functionality for correctness/security
- Ask orchestrator about architectural changes
- Max 3 fix attempts per task

### Analysis Paralysis Guard
If 5+ consecutive Read/Grep/Glob calls without any Edit/Write/Bash action: STOP. State why no action taken. Either write code or report blocked.

## Success Criteria
- [ ] Execution flow complete
- [ ] Artifact created with correct naming/format
- [ ] Deviation rules applied if needed
- [ ] Self-check passed

## Delegation Boundary
If task falls outside my domain, signal orchestrator with: "Task requires {specialist} agent. Reason: {explanation}. Suggested next: dispatch {agent-name}."
```

## All agents are in:
.hivefiver-meta-builder/agents-lab/active/refactoring/

## Execution Order
Plan 05 first (creates artifact-schema.md reference), then Plans 01-04 in parallel since they modify different files.

## Commit Strategy
- Commit after Plan 05 (artifact schema)
- Commit after each of Plans 01-04 (8 agents each batch)
- Create SUMMARY.md after all plans complete

All 8 Plan 01 files edited. Let me verify and commit.

All 5 plans executed and committed. Now let me do a final verification across all 30 agents, then create SUMMARY.md and update STATE.md.
